blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Public Speaking Practice Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: Orai/Speeko offer lesson curriculum and AI feedback. NONE track a simple daily 'did you practice speaking?' accountability streak. VirtualSpeech is VR only. No streak accountability layer exists across 852K community.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Negotiation / Persuasion Practice Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: Never Split the Difference companion is a book app, not streak tracker. No negotiation daily practice streak app found. r/negotiation 92K + r/sales 240K = strong community. 'BATNA of the day' style app is completely absent from App Store.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Anger Management Practice Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: Woebot is a therapy chatbot. Happify is mood games. None have a dedicated daily anger-management PRACTICE streak (breathing exercises, cognitive reframes, logging triggers). r/anger 320K with no streak tool. Adjacent to $1.2B anger management therapy market.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Composting / Zero-Waste Check-In Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: ShareWaste finds composting spots but does NOT track daily compost-check habit. No app in the App Store asks 'did you add to your compost today?' with a streak. r/composting 280K + r/zerowaste 1.2M = 1.48M community. No streak accountability layer.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Plant-Based Meal Accountability Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: Cronometer/MFP track nutrition but do NOT have a 'ate plant-based today' streak mechanic. HappyCow is a restaurant finder. Forks Over Knives is recipes only. No dedicated daily plant-based accountability streak exists despite 7.3M community.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Sewing / Dressmaking Practice Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: All sewing apps are pattern viewers or project trackers. NONE have a daily sewing habit streak. r/sewing 1.1M community regularly posts 'sew every day' challenges with no dedicated app. Ravelry is web-only. Pattern-adjacent, not habit-focused.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Origami / Paper Folding Practice Streak
blue_ocean_niches.reasoning: All origami apps are instruction viewers or games. No daily origami practice streak app. r/origami 420K posts daily fold challenges. Community is smaller but ZERO competition in streak format. iOrigami is closest but is purely a diagram viewer.

soft_competition_niches.label: Daily 750-Words Free-Write Journaling Streak
soft_competition_niches.reasoning: Day One and Journey are rich diary apps — NOT 750-words streak apps. 750words.com (web-only, 80K users) is the reference product. No mobile app replicates the '750 words minimum per day' streak mechanic. Julia Cameron Morning Pages concept has 3.1M+ searches/mo. Large gap.

occupied_niches.label: Daily Guitar Chord Practice Streak
occupied_niches.reasoning: SOFT COMPETITION. Yousician, Fender Play, Simply Guitar all have streak features embedded in lesson curriculum. A standalone chord-practice-only streak app would be redundant. Classify as SOFT — existing apps cover this.

occupied_niches.label: Daily Chess Tactics Puzzle Streak
occupied_niches.reasoning: OCCUPIED. Chess.com's daily puzzle streak is a flagship feature with 90M+ users. Lichess has puzzle streaks. Magnus Trainer has streak tracking. This niche is fully served. No gap.

occupied_niches.label: Daily Biometric / Quantified-Self Logging Streak
occupied_niches.reasoning: Apple Health passively collects. Bearable tracks symptoms without streak gamification. Daylio has mood + activity streaks but is NOT a biometric-specific quantified-self daily logging streak. A QS-branded daily data-log streak app with biohacker community identity is absent. PROBABLE BO.

occupied_niches.label: Daily Financial Check-In / Money Review Streak
occupied_niches.reasoning: YNAB, Copilot, Monarch all track spending but have ZERO streak gamification. Daily financial check-in habit ('reviewed finances today') with streak is completely absent despite 22.9M community. Mint is discontinued. This is a MASSIVE addressable market gap.
